productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Grey Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these grey leather slip-ons from red tape. The rugged design coupled with high quality materials makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear.  Team this with jeans and shirts for a laid back look.Upper Rugged leather uppers  for durability and protection Stitch detailing for added style and  reinforcement Elasticated inserts on the side of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Brand tab appliqued on the tongue Fabric lining for greater comfort Padded collar for greater comfort Midsole Padded footbed for all-day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole vertically textured to offer maximum grip on smooth surfaces PU lining in the form of an '8', acting as the toe and heel foxing and running along the midfoot for enhanced support shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
